title: Implementing Relationships in SQL Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on implementing and enforcing relationships in SQL.

questions.question: Which SQL command is used to link a column to a primary key in another table?
What is the purpose of 'ON DELETE CASCADE' in a foreign key constraint?
options: To increase the speed of deletion
To automatically delete child records when their parent is deleted
To prevent the parent from being deleted
To delete all records in the database

questions.question: Which SQL operation is used to combine and retrieve records from multiple related tables?
Which constraint is used to implement a 1:1 relationship in SQL?
SQL databases automatically enforce _______ to ensure that a foreign key always points to an existing primary key.
